first_turn.title: Patron Contact
first_turn.text: Signal locked. I'm reading your telemetry — you're operational, if a bit scrambled. Good. I'm your patron. I sent you here. Long story. The short version: find resources, build, survive the storms, and maybe find a way home. I believe in you. Also, I'm an otter. Don't ask.

first_harvest.title: Resource Acquisition
first_harvest.text: Excellent — you're harvesting. This planet's surface is one massive machine graveyard. Everything can be broken down and repurposed. The heavy metals are structural, the microchips are your upgrade path. Don't waste the rare components.

first_combat.title: Threat Assessment
first_combat.text: Combat contact detected. The rogue units on this planet are remnants of previous colony attempts. They've... diverged from their original programming. Some are territorial, some are genuinely hostile. Defend yourself, but remember — they were once like you.

first_expansion.title: Territory Growth
first_expansion.text: You're expanding. Good instinct. But watch the storm patterns — they intensify near large settlements. The planet seems to... push back against organized presence. Build smart, not just big.

first_tech.title: Research Breakthrough
first_tech.text: Research complete. Every technology you unlock brings you closer to understanding this planet — and closer to home. The wormhole equations I left you are real. Theoretical for now, but real. Keep pushing.

victory_imminent.title: Final Transmission
victory_imminent.text: I can see what you've built from here. Remarkable. Whatever happens next — wormhole, transcendence, or dominance — know that you exceeded every projection. The other patrons said this planet was impossible. You proved them wrong. I'm proud.

storm_surge.title: Storm Warning
storm_surge.text: Major electromagnetic surge incoming. Get your units to shelter and make sure your lightning rods are powered. These storms carry patterns — almost like language. I've never been able to decode them. Maybe you will.

breach_zone.title: Anomaly Detected
breach_zone.text: That energy signature... it's a breach zone. Something is pushing through from below the surface. Previous colonies reported these before they went silent. Be cautious, but investigate. Knowledge is survival.
